title: デビュー戦の後に・思惑の外

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
That racer's name, I think it was Agnes Tachyon,
right? She was amazing!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, she's already so talented, and she still has
room for growth!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon's dazzling performance enraptures
all those present at the race!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Phew! And that's how you do it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Why, if it isn't Trainer! As always, you have that
pure and innocent look befitting of a model
guinea pig!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Did you get the tea leaves I wanted?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh right, now isn't the time for this. I must speak
to you about something else.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
With the debut race out of the way, instead of
catching a breather, I must inform you of
something important. You know what I'm getting
at, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something important? And right after the debut
race? If I might hazard a guess...
choice_data_list: (Could it be about the next race?)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
My experimentation has reached a standstill, you
see. I must return to the lab at once.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: With that said, I will take my leave.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that said, she does indeed, take her
leave.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She promptly leaves without even a comment
about the debut race or a remark about her
future prospects.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, it remains true that she has garnered
much attention as a noteworthy runner!
